title: USSD Code Collection
description: A set of USSD codes importable by the My USSD Codes apps.

id.description: Unique collection identifier (kebab-case), matching the file name without extension.

description.description: What this collection contains and who it is for.

version.description: Bump on every content change so apps can detect updates.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code when the collection is country-specific.

carrier.description: Carrier name when the collection is carrier-specific.

language.description: BCP 47 tag of the language used in names/descriptions.
